history.content:
<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is a wall (#), so moving forward is blocked. The open floor is to my right, and there is lava farther ahead in that direction, but the immediate right-side path is safe. I should turn right to face the open corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is safe floor, while both sides are constrained by lava on the left and a wall on the right. Moving forward is the only safe progress.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is safe floor, and the corridor continues upward. Turning would not help because the right side is blocked by a wall and the left side contains lava nearby. The best action is to keep advancing safely.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. The cell to the right is a wall, leaving turning left as the only safe option to reorient away from the lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is safe floor, and there is an open vertical corridor upward. Lava lies mostly to the right side, so the safest progress is to move straight ahead.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
